headline: Weyerhaeuser Refocuses Portfolio With Virginia Sale And Land Solutions Growth
summary: Weyerhaeuser (NYSE:WY) completed the sale of non core timberlands in Virginia, recording a gain and adding to liquidity. The company reported a strong quarter in its Strategic Land Solutions segment, supported by a large conservation easement transaction. Weyerhaeuser also advanced its Wood Products business with new engineered offerings and expanded distribution capacity. For investors tracking NYSE:WY, these moves sit at the intersection of real assets, housing related demand, and long...
